SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-19-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bridgette Gutierrez Anguiano, Appellant
Gabriel Deyi, Respondent
Gabrielle Deyi, Respondent

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. Ms. Anquiano is present and sworn.
Mr. Deyi and Ms. Deyi appear at 9:50am and are sworn. Parties stipulate to be heard with Judge Pro Tem Jungreis.
The Court will allow the proceedings to continue.

JPT rules as follows: JPT will take the case under submission and determine his ruling.


Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungries
Clerk: Sylvia Java
Not reported
